title: A promising screening workflow for coral disease detection
abstract: We propose a promising workflow for coral disease detection and report encouraging early performance on a small convenience sample. The manuscript does not yet define the final protocol, uncertainty treatment, or reproducibility pathway.
manuscript_text: We describe a screening workflow and report one encouraging result. The current manuscript does not include a stable protocol, a decisive figure, a comparator rationale, or an uncertainty interval. The text argues that the workflow should be useful in many reef systems, but the operational boundary remains provisional.
ethics_and_disclosures: The authors declare no competing interests.
